reasoning: Your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Last ride's effort indicates a need for more intensity to adapt. Targeting over-unders will improve lactate processing, directly benefiting the sustained power needed on the Alpine Loop's key segment.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x12min over-unders: 4min at 201-218W, followed by 3min at 242-256W, recover at 209W for 3min between each interval

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
